evidence_rea: this data is collected when you leave a comment and displayed on the Website
your name and email address will also be saved in cookies
evidence_reg: The Controller SHALL provide the data subject with the following further information necessary to ensure fair and transparent processing at the time when personal data are obtained.
per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: The REA states data collection/display/cookie saving practices, while the REG requires provision of further information; these are not the same constraint, and no direct conflict is quoted.

evidence_rea: Name, email address, content of the comment: this data is collected when you leave a comment and displayed on the Website.
evidence_reg: The Controller SHALL provide the data subject with all of the following information at the time when personal data are obtained.
per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: The REA provides a statement about what data is collected and displayed, whereas the REG imposes a duty to provide information; without a directly matching or conflicting informational requirement, deviation is not clearly supported.

evidence_rea: Name, email address, content of the comment
evidence_reg: any legislative measure referred to in paragraph 1 shall contain provisions at least, where relevant, as to: (b) the categories of personal data;
per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: The REG addresses what a legislative measure must contain, not the same operative obligation expressed in the REA; the REA's listing of data categories does not directly conflict with the REG text.
